models.name: ResourceQueryContent
models.doc: Describes a query to be executed.

properties.name: subscriptions
properties.doc: Azure subscriptions against which to execute the query.

properties.name: managementGroups
properties.doc: Azure management groups against which to execute the query. Example: [ 'mg1', 'mg2' ]

properties.name: query
properties.doc: The resources query.

properties.name: options
properties.doc: The query evaluation options

properties.name: $skipToken
properties.doc: Continuation token for pagination, capturing the next page size and offset, as well as the context of the query.

properties.name: $top
properties.doc: The maximum number of rows that the query should return. Overrides the page size when ```$skipToken``` property is present.

properties.name: $skip
properties.doc: The number of rows to skip from the beginning of the results. Overrides the next page offset when ```$skipToken``` property is present.

properties.name: resultFormat
properties.doc: Defines in which format query result returned.

properties.name: allowPartialScopes
properties.doc: Only applicable for tenant and management group level queries to decide whether to allow partial scopes for result in case the number of subscriptions exceed allowed limits.

properties.name: authorizationScopeFilter
properties.doc: Defines what level of authorization resources should be returned based on the which subscriptions and management groups are passed as scopes.

properties.name: facets
properties.doc: An array of facet requests to be computed against the query result.

valueType.name: FacetRequest
valueType.doc: A request to compute additional statistics (facets) over the query results.

properties.name: expression
properties.doc: The column or list of columns to summarize by

properties.name: options
properties.doc: The options for facet evaluation

properties.name: sortBy
properties.doc: The column name or query expression to sort on. Defaults to count if not present.

properties.name: sortOrder
properties.doc: The sorting order by the selected column (count by default).

properties.name: filter
properties.doc: Specifies the filter condition for the 'where' clause which will be run on main query's result, just before the actual faceting.

properties.name: $top
properties.doc: The maximum number of facet rows that should be returned.

properties.name: totalRecords
properties.doc: Number of total records matching the query.

properties.name: count
properties.doc: Number of records returned in the current response. In the case of paging, this is the number of records in the current page.

properties.name: resultTruncated
properties.doc: Indicates whether the query results are truncated.

properties.name: $skipToken
properties.doc: When present, the value can be passed to a subsequent query call (together with the same query and scopes used in the current request) to retrieve the next page of data.

properties.name: data
properties.doc: Query output in JObject array or Table format.

properties.name: facets
properties.doc: Query facets.

valueType.name: Facet
valueType.doc: A facet containing additional statistics on the response of a query. Can be either FacetResult or FacetError.

properties.name: expression
properties.doc: Facet expression, same as in the corresponding facet request.

FacetResult.name: FacetResult
FacetResult.doc: Successfully executed facet containing additional statistics on the response of a query.

properties.name: totalRecords
properties.doc: Number of total records in the facet results.

properties.name: count
properties.doc: Number of records returned in the facet response.

properties.name: data
properties.doc: A JObject array or Table containing the desired facets. Only present if the facet is valid.

properties.name: resultType
properties.doc: Result type

FacetError.name: FacetError
FacetError.doc: A facet whose execution resulted in an error.

properties.name: errors
properties.doc: An array containing detected facet errors with details.

properties.name: code
properties.doc: Error code identifying the specific error.

properties.name: message
properties.doc: A human readable error message.

properties.name: resultType
properties.doc: Result type

models.name: ErrorResponse
models.doc: An error response from the API.

properties.name: error
properties.doc: Error information.

properties.doc: Error code identifying the specific error.

properties.name: message
properties.doc: A human readable error message.

properties.name: details
properties.doc: Error details
